leadership_ownership.description: Demonstrates senior ownership: drives projects end-to-end, takes accountability

questions.question: Tell me about a time you took ownership of a project that was failing. What did you do?
Describe a situation where you had to make a critical decision without complete information.
Tell me about a time you disagreed with your manager's technical decision. What did you do?
Describe a time you proactively identified and fixed a problem before it became critical.
Tell me about a time you had to lead a team through significant uncertainty or ambiguity.

technical_depth.description: Shows deep technical judgment, architecture decisions, tradeoffs

questions.question: Tell me about the most complex technical problem you've solved. Walk me through your approach.
Describe a time you had to make a significant architectural decision. What tradeoffs did you consider?
Tell me about a time you had to learn a new technology quickly to solve a problem.
Describe a system you built that you're particularly proud of — what made it excellent?
Tell me about a time a technical decision you made didn't pan out. What happened and what did you learn?

collaboration_influence.description: Works effectively across teams, influences without authority

questions.question: Tell me about a time you had to influence stakeholders who didn't report to you.
Describe a conflict with a colleague or cross-functional partner. How did you resolve it?
Tell me about a time you had to work with a difficult team member. How did you handle it?
Describe a time you successfully aligned multiple teams with competing priorities.
Tell me about a time you mentored someone and what impact it had.

impact_delivery.description: Delivers measurable results, prioritizes high-impact work

questions.question: Tell me about the highest-impact project you've delivered. How did you measure success?
Describe a time you had to prioritize between multiple critical projects. How did you decide?
Tell me about a time you significantly improved system performance or reliability.
Describe a time you delivered under a tight deadline. What tradeoffs did you make?
Tell me about a time your work directly impacted business outcomes (revenue, users, costs).
Tell me about a significant mistake you made. How did you handle it and what did you learn?
Describe a time you had to significantly change your approach mid-project. Why and how?
Tell me about a time you received critical feedback. How did you respond?
Describe how you stay current with technology trends and decide which to invest in.
Tell me about a time you had to admit you were wrong to a stakeholder. How did you handle it?

customer_focus.description: Keeps end user needs at center of technical decisions

questions.question: Tell me about a time you advocated for the customer when others were focused on technical concerns.
Describe a time you gathered user feedback that significantly changed your technical direction.
Tell me about a time you had to balance technical debt with user-facing features.
Describe a situation where you simplified a complex technical system to improve user experience.
Tell me about a time you anticipated a customer need before they expressed it.
